patterns.github_actions_structure: Standard GitHub Actions workflow with jobs for build, lint, and test
patterns.gradle_commands: Use ./gradlew for builds to ensure wrapper consistency
patterns.caching_strategy: Cache Gradle dependencies and build outputs for faster CI runs
patterns.trigger_events: Run on push to main and on all pull requests

existing_implementations.description: No existing CI/CD configuration found - this is a new setup

build_job.description: Compile the Android app using Gradle

lint_job.description: Run Android lint checks for code quality

best_practices.gradle_wrapper: Always use ./gradlew, never install Gradle separately
best_practices.java_version: Use Java 17 or 11 for Android builds
best_practices.parallel_jobs: Run lint and test in parallel after successful build
best_practices.fail_fast: Stop on first failure to save CI minutes
